idea-plugin.name: OpenFastTrace Language Server
idea-plugin.description:
LSP server integration for OpenFastTrace requirement tracing files.
  • Hover over a coverage tag to see the referenced spec item's title and description
  • Go to Definition on a coverage tag jumps to the spec item definition
  • Go to Definition on a spec item ID shows all coverage tags
  • Find References on a spec item lists all coverage tags
  • Warnings for outdated coverage tag revisions with a quick fix to update them
